NFO Permit No. ___ (For Division Use Only)
APPLICATION FOR EXCEPTION TO NO-FLARE RULE 19.15.18.12 (See Rule 19.15.18.12 NMAC and Rule 19.15.7.37 NMAC)
A. Applicant  $ \underline{\text{EOG Y Resources, Inc.}} $____,
whose address is  $ \underline{\text{105 S. Fourth Street, Artesia, NM 88210}} $____,
hereby requests an exception to Rule 19.15.18.12 for _____ days or until
$ \underline{\text{December 16, 2016 - March 16}} $, Yr  $ \underline{\text{2017}} $，for the following described tank battery (or LACT):
Name of Lease  $ \underline{\text{Perdomo BMP State Com #1H Btty}} $ Name of Pool  $ \underline{\text{Bone Spring}} $
Location of Battery: Unit Letter  $ \underline{L} $ Section  $ \underline{24} $ Township  $ \underline{24S} $ Range  $ \underline{27E} $
B. Based upon oil production of  $ \underline{434} $ barrels per day, the estimated * volume
of gas to be flared is  $ \underline{\text{1640 +/- Daily}} $ MCF; Value _____ per day.
C. Name and location of nearest gas gathering facility: ___
D. Distance ___ Estimated cost of connection ___

E. This exception is requested for the following reasons:  $ \underline{\text{Requesting permission to flare due to abnormal system pressures in Agave lines.}} $ The possibility of flare will not be consistent; therefore, the volume above can easily fluctuate.
OPERATOR

I hereby certify that the rules and regulations of the Oil Conservation Division have been complied with and that the information given above is true and complete to the best of my knowledge and belief.
Signature Momena
Printed Name
& Title  $ \underline{\text{Carrissa M. O'Meara, Sr. Production Reporting Asst.}} $
E-mail Address  $ \underline{\text{Carrissa OMeara@eogresources.com}} $
Date: December 12, 2016 Telephone No: 575-748-4203 OIL CONSERVATION DIVISION
Approved Until March 14, 2017
By Amalia Bustamante
Title Business Op. Sp.
Please see attached C.D.A.5
$ ^{*} $ Gas-Oil ratio test may be required to verify estimated gas volume.
